description: Reward parameters governing XP computation, truth-state discounts, and mint rates
gamma_description: Truth-state discount factors. OK claims receive full reward; NEAR claims receive phi^-2; AMBIG and VOID receive nothing.
base_xp_description: Base experience points awarded per quest completion before modifiers
capsule_clamp_description: Maximum number of capsule references a single quest can claim credit for
epoch_clamp_description: Maximum number of epochs a quest can remain active before forced closure
resonance_ratio_description: Golden-ratio scaling factor for resonance-class quest rewards (phi^-1)

Solo.description: Standard mint rate for solo quest completions

Guild.description: Enhanced mint rate for guild quests (phi multiplier)

Community.description: Higher mint rate for community quests (phi^2 multiplier)

reward_rules: Final XP = base_xp * gamma[truth_state] * difficulty_multiplier * phi^(-(pass-1))
Capsule references beyond capsule_clamp are ignored in reward calculation
Quests exceeding epoch_clamp epochs have their reward halved
Resonance quests multiply final XP by resonance_ratio for harmonic propagation
Mint rate determines the token emission per XP point earned
Storm and Crown mint rates stack with coalition_bonus from StormPolicy
